title: Red Hat Security Advisory: wireshark security update
overview:
An update for wireshark is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream EUS (v. 10.0)
Red Hat Enterprise Linux CodeReady Linux Builder EUS (v. 10.0)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: wireshark security update

An update for wireshark is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for wireshark is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.0 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
wireshark-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.src.rpm
wireshark-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-cli-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-cli-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-debugsource-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
wireshark-cli-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
wireshark-cli-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
wireshark-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
wireshark-debugsource-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
wireshark-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
wireshark-cli-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
wireshark-cli-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
wireshark-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
wireshark-debugsource-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
wireshark-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-cli-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-cli-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-debuginfo-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-debugsource-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm
wireshark-devel-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.x86_64.rpm
wireshark-devel-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.ppc64le.rpm
wireshark-devel-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.s390x.rpm
wireshark-devel-4.4.2-3.el10_0.2.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-9817: A flaw was found in Wireshark’s SSH dissector, caused by a missing NULL check in key exchange parameter handling. This vulnerability can trigger a segmentation fault when processing malformed SSH traffic or crafted capture files, potentially causing the application to crash and resulting in a denial of service.
